resources.string: Holding the BT audio link open
Holding the BT audio link open
Higher = louder fill, more reliable wake. Default is inaudible on most setups.

Plays sub-audible noise so cheap Bluetooth speakers don\'t treat silence between sentences as \"no signal\" and put the amp into standby. The first syllable after each pause stops getting clipped. Audible (or any other player) keeps full control of play/pause — this app never claims media focus.
Streams whenever you toggle it on.
Streams only while another app plays media.
